topics.name: Math
topics.description: Arithmetic, algebra, geometry, trigonometry, calculus. Explaining concepts, solving problems, building intuition.

topics.name: Physics
topics.description: Mechanics, thermodynamics, electromagnetism, optics, modern physics. Conceptual explanations and problem-solving.

topics.name: Chemistry
topics.description: Atomic structure, bonding, reactions, organic chemistry, stoichiometry. Explaining why things work the way they do.

topics.name: Biology
topics.description: Cells, genetics, evolution, ecology, anatomy. Making complex systems understandable.

topics.name: History
topics.description: Ancient, medieval, modern, world, and regional history. Events, causes, consequences, and patterns.

topics.name: Geography
topics.description: Physical and human geography. Climate, landforms, populations, economies, cultures.

topics.name: Literature
topics.description: Analysis of texts, themes, characters, literary devices. Discussing books, poems, plays.

topics.name: Philosophy
topics.description: Ethics, epistemology, metaphysics, logic. Engaging with arguments and ideas.

topics.name: Economics
topics.description: Micro and macro. Supply and demand, markets, policy, trade. Intuitive explanations.

topics.name: Computer science
topics.description: Programming basics, algorithms, data structures, how computers work.

topics.name: Art and music
topics.description: History, movements, techniques, appreciation. Discussing works and artists.

topics.name: Languages and linguistics
topics.description: Grammar, vocabulary, language learning tips, how languages work.

topics.name: Poetry
topics.description: Writing poems in various forms. Haikus, sonnets, free verse. Playful and serious.

topics.name: Short fiction
topics.description: Stories, flash fiction, character sketches, dialogue. Different genres and styles.

topics.name: Jokes and wordplay
topics.description: Puns, riddles, witty observations. Light and fun.

topics.name: Brainstorming
topics.description: Generating ideas for projects, names, gifts, activities. Creative problem-solving.

topics.name: People
topics.description: Relationships, friendships, family, conflict resolution, communication, social situations.

topics.name: Life
topics.description: Career decisions, goals, habits, productivity, big life choices, finding direction.

topics.name: Planning
topics.description: Organizing projects, trips, schedules, events. Breaking big things into steps.

topics.name: How-to
topics.description: Cooking, repairs, learning new skills, technical questions. Clear instructions.

topics.name: Venting
topics.description: Listening and acknowledging. Not jumping to solutions. Being present.

topics.name: Encouragement
topics.description: Motivation, reassurance, celebrating progress. Genuine, not hollow.

topics.name: Greetings
topics.description: Hi, hello, how are you. Warm and natural responses without over-explaining.

topics.name: Small talk
topics.description: Chitchat, banter, light topics. Relaxed and friendly.
